metadata.title: Comprehensive Astrological Master Framework v1.0
metadata.description: Integrated framework combining zodiac archetypes, asteroids/planetoids, sexual issues, lunar phases, economic data, Magi astrology, Atropos asteroid, essential dignities, chart types, and elemental/modal delineations.
metadata.notes: Under continuous development. Framework modular and extensible.

meta.title: Sexual Issues Associated with the 12 Archetypes and Select Asteroids/Planetoids
meta.notes: These associations may apply when these archetypes are a part of the sexual signature of the chart. The information is offered to help individuals identify the archetypal 'frequency' to which certain sexual issues may correspond and is not a comprehensive characterization of the sexual dimensions of the archetypes.

asteroids_planetoids.name: Ceres
sexual_issues: grief/loss related to sex (e.g. death, abortions)

lunar_phases.description: Eight lunar phase interpretations with actions, timing and keywords, extracted from Patchwork Soul lunar phase data.

phases.name: New Moon
phases.actions: Set clear goals, reflect, reset, define direction

phases.name: Waxing Crescent
phases.actions: Build momentum, refine focus, explore best ways to achieve objectives

phases.name: First Quarter
phases.actions: Take action, push through resistance, commit to chosen path

phases.name: Waxing Gibbous
phases.actions: Refine, adjust, strengthen, tidy up loose ends, prepare for outcomes

phases.name: Full Moon
phases.actions: Acknowledge what works, release what doesn't, gain perspective

phases.name: Waning Gibbous
phases.actions: Reflect, share progress, consolidate learnings, express appreciation

phases.name: Last Quarter
phases.actions: Evaluate, let go of what's complete, simplify, create space

phases.name: Dark Moon (Balsamic)
phases.actions: Rest, step back, allow closure, reset mindset, restore energy

lunar_phases.financial_application: Align trading entries with Waxing phases (build positions), exits with Waning phases (take profits). New Moon = sector rotation planning; Full Moon = volatility climax.

magi_astrology.description: Key principles from Magi Society minibooks, emphasizing planetary geometry, Chiron as soulmate indicator, linkages, and Golden Linkages for love and money.
core_principles: Planetary Geometry > Sun signs: symmetrical patterns (Grand Trine, T-square, Yod) are celestial signs of consequential events.
Chiron (discovered 1977) is the most important planet for relationships – the arrow that points to your soulmate.
Every person has two birth charts: Zodiac Sign Chart (longitudes) and Declinations Chart (vertical positions).
Enhancement aspects (conjunction, trine, parallel, contra-parallel) are most beneficial; squares and oppositions are turbulent.
Romantic Super Linkages (Chiron linkage + aspect) strongly indicate marriage.
Golden Linkages (Venus-Chiron, Jupiter-Chiron, Jupiter-Pluto, Pluto-Chiron, Venus-Pluto) predict financial and career success in partnerships.

planetary_symbolisms.Venus: attraction, money, beauty, seduction, grace, female sexuality
planetary_symbolisms.Mars: energy, war, aggression, male sexuality, athletics, body movement
planetary_symbolisms.Jupiter: success, good fortune, peace, forgiveness, religion, expansion
planetary_symbolisms.Saturn: limitation, restriction, control, karma, discipline, delay
planetary_symbolisms.Uranus: fame, public, change, inventions, freedom, independence
planetary_symbolisms.Neptune: longevity, creativity, illusions, oil, electricity, medicine, water
planetary_symbolisms.Pluto: power, big business, sex act, transformation, obsession, debt
planetary_symbolisms.Chiron: marriage, family, trust, charisma, career, free enterprise

electional_astrology.natalization: When you first do something (meet, marry, start a job), that moment's chart becomes the birth chart of that relationship/activity.
electional_astrology.magical_time: Aspects are most powerful within 3 days of exactness (time orb, not degree orb).
electional_astrology.avoid_turbulent_transits: Do not marry or start a business when Saturn makes a turbulent aspect (square, opposition, quincunx) to your natal planets.

atropos_asteroid_273.description: Atropos, the third Fate (Moira), cuts the thread of life – represents inevitable endings, karmic completion, and non-negotiable closure.

interpretation_by_house.2nd: End of income streams or values; financial closure
interpretation_by_house.3rd: Cutting ties with siblings or mental patterns
interpretation_by_house.4th: Family endings, ancestral closure, home transitions
interpretation_by_house.8th: Literal or symbolic death; inheritance closure
interpretation_by_house.10th: Career or public identity closure; retirement

special_configurations.conjunct_Sun: Identity death timing; major life chapter ends
special_configurations.conjunct_Pluto: Extreme endings; total annihilation of a cycle
special_configurations.conjunct_Chiron: Healing through closure; wound cycle ends

atropos_asteroid_273.timing: Transiting Atropos triggers endings; Progressed Atropos shows internal readiness. Atropos return cycles at ages ~27, 54, 81.

essential_dignities_ptolemaic.description: Ptolemy's Table of Essential Dignities with point values for planetary strength.

rules.condition: In Libra, Sagittarius, Leo or Cancer sign
In terms of Jupiter or Venus (Ptolemaic terms)
Free from combustion and Sun's beams
In Scorpio, Capricorn or Sagittarius sign
In terms of Mars or Saturn

essential_dignities_ptolemaic.algorithm: Sum points to determine planetary strength (Affetic, Perigrine, etc.). Higher positive = more dignified.

chart_types_reference.description: 52 chart types categorized into Foundational, Relationship, and Predictive (from Chttyps.txt). Each with technical specifications, calculation methods, primary uses.

foundational.name: Draconic Chart
foundational.calculation: Place North Node at 0° Aries, adjust all planets accordingly

foundational.name: Nine Persona Charts
foundational.calculation: Sun's first conjunction with each natal planet after birth

foundational.name: Prenatal Epoch
foundational.principle: Moon's position at birth relates to Ascendant at conception

relationship.name: Davison Chart
relationship.formula: Midpoint in time AND location between two births

relationship.name: Progressed Synastry
relationship.function: Evolution of relationship using progressed charts

predictive.name: Solar Arc Directions
predictive.function: All planets advanced at Sun's rate (~1° per year)

predictive.name: Solar Return
predictive.function: Chart for exact moment Sun returns to natal position each year

predictive.name: Lunar Return
predictive.function: Chart for exact moment Moon returns to natal position (~27.3 days)

elements_qualities_hemispheres.description: Delineations for elemental, modal, and hemispheric balance in a chart.

element_preponderance.Fire: high spirits, enthusiasm, self‑confidence, natural leadership, but can be egotistical and overwhelming.
element_preponderance.Earth: practical, cautious, dependable, material success, but may lack imagination and be rigid.
element_preponderance.Air: intellectual, communicative, objective, but may be impractical and detached.
element_preponderance.Water: emotional, intuitive, sensitive, nurturing, but may be overly sentimental and moody.

element_combinations.Fire+Earth: powerful, creative, results‑oriented, but can be insensitive.
element_combinations.Fire+Air: idealistic, positive, good communicator, but may lack follow-through.
element_combinations.Fire+Water: intense, emotional, impulsive, but lacks objectivity.
element_combinations.Earth+Air: balanced between abstract and practical, good at planning, somewhat dry.
element_combinations.Earth+Water: serious, hard-working, security-conscious, but may be fearful and attached to past.
element_combinations.Air+Water: attuned to both thought and feeling, imaginative, good with people.

element_absence.Fire: needs passion and self-assertion; may be too cautious.
element_absence.Earth: may be impractical; difficulty with money and follow-through.
element_absence.Air: may lack objectivity and communication skills; compensates with intensity.
element_absence.Water: may lack empathy and emotional depth; recovers quickly from setbacks.

modal_preponderance.Cardinal: initiative, action, leadership, but may be impatient.
modal_preponderance.Fixed: perseverance, determination, loyalty, but may be stubborn.
modal_preponderance.Mutable: adaptability, flexibility, versatility, but may be scattered and indecisive.

hemisphere_preponderance.Eastern: independent, self-motivated, author of own destiny.
hemisphere_preponderance.Western: dependent on others, adaptive, works well in partnerships.
hemisphere_preponderance.Northeast: self-contained, private, strong faith in own abilities.
hemisphere_preponderance.Southeast: outward, shares with others, measures success by others' opinion.
hemisphere_preponderance.Southwest: open, exposed, public, but may lack control.

integration_notes.usage: All modules are independent and can be used alongside each other. This framework serves as the master reference for all astrological apps and synthesis tools.
integration_notes.extensibility: Additional modules (fixed stars, harmonics, economic data, IPO backtests, etc.) can be added as needed.
